allow: Bash(git add app/src/main/java/me/rerere/rikkahub/data/model/TextSelectionConfig.kt app/src/main/java/me/rerere/rikkahub/ui/activity/TextSelectionVM.kt app/src/main/java/me/rerere/rikkahub/ui/pages/setting/SettingAndroidIntegrationPage.kt app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml app/src/main/res/values-zh/strings.xml app/src/main/res/values-zh-rTW/strings.xml app/src/main/res/values-ja/strings.xml app/src/main/res/values-ko-rKR/strings.xml app/src/main/res/values-ru/strings.xml)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat\(text-selection\): support per-action model selection

Allow each text selection action \(translate, explain, summarize, ask\) to
specify its own model, so users can use lighter models for quick tasks
instead of the heavy main chat model. Falls back to assistant/global model
when not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git stash && git pull origin master --rebase && git stash pop)
